Video.summary: An abandoned barn rests on a forest's edge.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Days Gone By

Video.summary: Bob paints a tranquil winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Paradise

Video.summary: Bob paints a fishermen's hideaway.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cabin by the Pond

Video.summary: Bob paints an autumn scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Indian Summer

Video.summary: Dawn's glow caresses a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Forest Dawn Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints an untouched winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Tranquil Dawn

Video.summary: Waves thunder against coastal rock.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Waves of Wonder

Video.summary: Using only gray and white to paint a cabin amid frozen mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Shades of Gray

Video.summary: Bob Ross offers tips and shares painting techniques.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Valley View

Video.summary: Bob paints a quiet brook in a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Serenity

Video.summary: The fall breeze rustles in the trees and skips across crisp still waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Splendor

Video.summary: Bob uses blue tones to paint a wintry scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cabin at Trail's End

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wilderness Cabin

Video.summary: Bob paints with red, orange and brown.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pathway to Autumn

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain and small waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Royal Majesty

Video.summary: Bob paints a serene seascape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: By the Sea

Video.summary: Bob paints a pastel mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Rhapsody

Video.summary: A stream coasts across autumn hills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Fall Stream

Video.summary: As the night settles over a rocky coast, a warm glow of the ending day still sits in the sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ebony Sea

Video.summary: The glistening sun peeks through the trees in this wintry scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Sun

Video.summary: Bob paints a chilly autumn landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Change of Seasons

Video.summary: Bob paints a rickety forest shack.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Delight

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunrise.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Fisherman's Paradise

Video.summary: Bob paints a storm's onset.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Just Before the Storm

Video.summary: A scenic world of green trees and bushes reflecting into calm waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Lake

Video.summary: Bob overlaps summer and winter on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Double Take

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow-tipped valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: First Snow

Video.summary: Bob paints a southern scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cypress Swamp

Video.summary: Bob paints distant mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Downstream View

Video.summary: Bob paints the desert in spring.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Desert Hues

Video.summary: Bob paints a wilderness home.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Delightful Meadow Home

Video.summary: Bob paints a fence beside a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: The Property Line

Video.summary: Bob paints a foggy river.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: In the Stillness of Morning

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow-covered church house in front of icy mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Christmas Eve Snow

Video.summary: Bob paints a hidden lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lake in the Valley

Video.summary: Truly picture perfect; a bright day and still water combine to make amazing mirrored images throughout this Bob Ross mountain masterpiece.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Reflections

Video.summary: Warm summer mountain water and luxurious green grass.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Brown Mountain

Video.summary: An approaching storm and dramatic sky set the mood for this unique seascape, painted half black and half white.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black & White Seascape

Video.summary: A bright green grassy forest, where a smooth crystal waterway flows so, so quietly.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lazy River

Video.summary: A slow river winds around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black River

Video.summary: Bob paints a night scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Winter Moon Oval
